notes: Raphael prefers curating/commenting over original hot takes
Consider newsletter highlights as X content instead

cards.title: GenAI Knowledge Base
cards.description: 6,604 entries from 51 sources. Quality gate + semantic dedup active. Auto-syncs daily 08:00 UTC. AI search API on port 3001.
notes: API: port 3001, systemd kanban-api, bearer auth

cards.title: KB Quality Backfill + Post-Build Pipeline
cards.description: 2,934 KB entries (44.9%) had no quality score. Heuristic backfill scored all entries (0→100%). Built post-build pipeline script for automated kanban sync, KB scoring, source health, and git push.

cards.title: Disk Space Manager & Cleanup Tool
cards.description: System observation — disk at 85% (2.8GB free) with 3.5GB reclaimable. Highest-urgency operational item; no pending build tasks in queue.

cards.title: X Quality Gate Enhancement + KB Cleanup
cards.description: Follow-up to 2026-03-02 KB Analytics build — highest-value action from discovered insights (18.4% X spam rate, @unknown quality issues, category drift into Strategy & Opinion)

cards.title: KB Content Analytics & Retroactive Scorer
cards.description: Kanban review — highest-value unblocked item: KB quality improvement (addresses 57% unscored entries, 18% X spam rate, LinkedIn source failure, category imbalance)

cards.title: Daily Notes Auto-Populator
cards.description: Build queue (medium priority) — "Daily notes auto-populator"

cards.title: KB Source Health Tracker + LinkedIn API Fix
cards.description: Kanban — KB is the priority. LinkedIn API has been silently failing for 2+ days with no alert. Built a health monitoring system that would have caught it immediately.

cards.description: Build queue — natural follow-up to yesterday's KB Weekly Digest Generator (2026-02-26). Wires the digest into a weekly cron with Telegram delivery and GitHub Pages publishing.
